modules.title: Browser-side Kernel
modules.summary: Session, run queue, loop, compaction, and the future browser-side brain mainline.

modules.title: Observability And Audit
modules.summary: Diagnostics, audit tail, runtime history, replay, and observability export contracts/builders are landed. Remaining mainline gap is shared MV3 projection of timeline/summary/rawEventTail; broader export breadth stays deferred.
shipped_scope: observability export contracts/builders for timeline/summary/rawEventTail (contracts/core/site-runtime, test-backed)
provider routing diagnostics (LLM profile resolution status)
deferred_scope: shared debug dump/export action (operator-level bulk export)
richer future event-source breadth from full skill SDK/studio and wider browser automation composites
modules.deferral_rationale: Gate F (Operability) is satisfied. ISSUE-143 already landed the export schema/builder, and ISSUE-161 closed the page-action handoff boundary that previously blocked browser-automation event production. Waiting for full skill-runtime-sdk-studio shipped status is now too coarse: the next mainline gap is a narrower contracts/core/background projection tracked by ISSUE-166. Only bulk dump/export and broader future event-source breadth remain intentionally deferred.

modules.title: Intervention And Handoff
modules.summary: Human intervention, runtime handoff, escalation, shared audit/read surfaces, and operator resolution flow around automation and runtime failures.
shipped_scope: runtime handoff contract for verify_failed/runtime_blocked automation failures
kernel and MV3 intervention request/resolve/cancel/timeout lifecycle with durable restart round-trip
runtime.summary.interventions and audit.intervention shared read surfaces
cross-tab/window coordination plus structured stale/timeout escalation audit entries
shared sidepanel resolve/reject UI for pending intervention requests
deferred_scope: richer studio/operator workflow polish beyond the shared sidepanel management surface
modules.deferral_rationale: Current cutover-critical intervention scope is landed. Remaining UI polish belongs to adjacent AI-surface/studio work and no longer justifies keeping intervention-handoff itself in partial status.

modules.title: AI Surface Control Plane
modules.summary: Product control-plane surfaces across runtime, config, skills, hosts, and northbound action/resource boundaries.

modules.title: Site Runtime And Browser Automation
modules.summary: Current cutover-critical site runtime and browser automation scope is landed; wider automation breadth and export surfaces remain deferred.
shipped_scope: active-tab-only site runtime boundary, explicit invoke-only injection, and real page-hook injection chain
page.query/click/fill/press_key/screenshot plus tabs.list/get_active/navigate runtime paths through MV3/runtime-services
background lane baseline with explicit target routing, DOM stabilization policy, and non-active-tab page action coverage
cutover docs that lock Tier 1/Tier 2/Tier 3 browser automation scope
deferred_scope: Tier 2/Tier 3 breadth such as page.scroll/select_option/hover, tabs.create/close, and stealth/computer mode
download/export composites such as screenshot_with_highlight, download_image, and download_chat_images
future provider-bridge unification if page/tabs/site runtime is later routed through FamilyProvider by default
modules.deferral_rationale: Soft Gate 2's cutover-critical scope is landed and no longer needs an executable live slice. Remaining work is intentionally outside the current cutover bar or belongs to later product/export breadth, so the module should be tracked as shipped-with-deferred-scope rather than partial.

modules.title: Execution Host And Bridge
modules.summary: JS runner, host substrate, offscreen bridge, MV3 runtime wiring, and local or remote execution host paths.

modules.title: Provider And Profile Routing
modules.summary: Provider registry, profile routing, escalation policy, and model-selection control flow.

modules.title: BrowserVFS
modules.summary: mem:// semantics, IndexedDB persistence, package discovery, retention, and VFS error-path correctness.

modules.title: Skill Runtime, SDK, And Studio
modules.summary: Executable skill packaging, lifecycle, SDK authoring, and future studio surfaces.

modules.title: Repo Workflow And DX
modules.summary: Workflow guardrails, documentation hygiene, CI, lint, and backlog planning ergonomics for parallel agents.
